# Anti-Slop Pre-Export Checklist

Run this gate **before** every export. If any item fails, redo — do not ship.

## Visual

- [ ] No gradient backgrounds spanning >25% of any artifact
- [ ] No purple→pink, cyan→magenta, or rainbow palettes
- [ ] No stock-photo people in business attire
- [ ] No emoji (✨📊🚀) or sparkle / glow icons
- [ ] No more than 2 accent colors per artifact
- [ ] All charts have axis labels, units, and a data source citation
- [ ] All tables have header rows and consistent column alignment

## Content

- [ ] No "lorem ipsum", "TBD", or `{placeholder}` survived
- [ ] No win themes phrased as adjective-noun pairs ("Innovative Excellence")
- [ ] Every claim cites a workspace entity ID or document section
- [ ] Every CLIN, clause, factor referenced exists in the active KG
- [ ] No invented past-performance contracts, certifications, or personnel
- [ ] All "shall" statements traced to a deliverable or performance standard

## Format

- [ ] PPTX is editable in PowerPoint (open it; click a text box; type)
- [ ] PDF page count matches the brief
- [ ] Page margins ≥0.75" on all sides
- [ ] Body text ≥11pt PDF / ≥22pt slide
- [ ] Filenames follow `<workspace>_<artifact>_<yyyymmdd>.<ext>`

## Federal-specific

- [ ] No FOUO / CUI markings on documents intended for public release (and vice versa)
- [ ] Color is never the only carrier of meaning (status-color cells include text)
- [ ] Fonts are PDF-embeddable and royalty-free
